SRR5223500 fastp Report.command: fastp --in1 data/raw_fastq/SRR5223500_1.fastq.gz --in2 data/raw_fastq/SRR5223500_2.fastq.gz --out1 data/trimmed_fastq/SRR5223500_1.trimmed.fastq.gz --out2 data/trimmed_fastq/SRR5223500_2.trimmed.fastq.gz --json qc/fastp_reports/SRR5223500_fastp.json --html qc/fastp_reports/SRR5223500_fastp.html --cut_right --cut_window_size 4 --cut_mean_quality 20 --length_required 50 --detect_adapter_for_pe --correction --thread 4 --report_title SRR5223500 fastp Report
